summary: Routed CalibrationRules writing pipeline nudge and training consistency summary copy out of Core/Domain. CalibrationRules now returns semantic writing nudge kind and training consistency band plus structured counts/rates; TrainView and WriteView format the visible copy through localized keys. Added four keys across all 19 locales and updated focused training tests to assert semantic values instead of English strings.
validations_passed: xcodebuild build -quiet -project owlory_xcode/Owlory.xcodeproj -scheme Owlory -configuration Debug -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' -derivedDataPath /tmp/owlory-helper-followup-build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO

contract_status_changes.before: Core/Domain/CalibrationRules built English strings for writingPipelineNudge.message and trainingConsistencySummary.message, and TrainView/WriteView rendered those strings directly.
contract_status_changes.after: Core/Domain/CalibrationRules returns semantic WritingPipelineNudge.Kind and TrainingConsistencySummary.Band plus captureCount/completionPercent. TrainView and WriteView own localized visible formatting through train.calibration.consistencySummary.* and write.calibration.pipelineNudge.captureBacklog keys.
proof: xcodebuild build -quiet -project owlory_xcode/Owlory.xcodeproj -scheme Owlory -configuration Debug -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' -derivedDataPath /tmp/owlory-helper-followup-build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO

residual_risks: Non-English strings are LLM-drafted and have not been native-reviewed.
No running-app smoke, screenshot proof, device proof, or TestFlight proof was performed for these new Train/Write strings.
The required build still reports the pre-existing TodayView onChange(of:perform:) iOS 17 deprecation warning; this slice did not touch that path.
recommended_next_reason: Supervisor dry-run after marking this slice done reported: stop: no eligible queued slice found.
